title: sweetia elegans
intro: Sweetia elegans, also known as Sweet Annie or Chinese Chrysanthemum, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Sweetia elegans include its ability to reduce fever, relieve respiratory issues, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various ailments.
